levels.name: A1 - Elemental
levels.description: Falsos Principiantes - Competencia fundamental en contextos básicos

competencies.title: Present Simple (Affirmative, Negative, Questions)
competencies.descriptor: Conjugar correctamente 'to be' y verbos regulares en tercera persona, Formar preguntas básicas con 'Do/Does'

competencies.title: Personal Pronouns & Possessive Adjectives
competencies.descriptor: Identificar y usar I/me, you/your, he/his, she/her, it/its, we/our, they/their

competencies.title: Imperative Form
competencies.descriptor: Dar instrucciones simples y directas (Go, Stop, Listen, Sit)
competencies.context: Órdenes en clase, instrucciones de seguridad

competencies.title: There is / There are (Singular & Plural)
competencies.descriptor: Usar correctamente para describir existencia de cosas en ubicaciones

competencies.title: Simple Prepositions of Place & Time
competencies.descriptor: Dominar in, on, at, near, next to, between, at [time], on [day], in [month/year]
examples: The book is on the table

competencies.title: Simple Public Notices & Signs
competencies.descriptor: Identificar significado de Signs: Exit, Entrance, Open, Closed, Danger, No Smoking, WC

competencies.title: Very Short Personal Messages & Notes
competencies.descriptor: Comprender mensajes de 1-2 líneas con vocabulario conocido
competencies.context: SMS, notas de amigos, mensajes simples

competencies.title: Basic Instructions with Visual Support
competencies.descriptor: Seguir instrucciones de 3-4 pasos simples (recetas básicas, cómo usar máquinas)
competencies.context: Manuales de usuario, instrucciones de juegos
examples: 1. Open the box. 2. Press the button. 3. Wait 5 seconds.

competencies.title: Simple Dialogue Exchanges
competencies.descriptor: Comprender diálogos de saludo y presentación

competencies.title: Numbers, Days, Months in Written Form
competencies.descriptor: Reconocer números cardinales escritos, días y meses

competencies.title: Simple Affirmative & Negative Statements
competencies.descriptor: Escribir oraciones básicas: 'I am happy. I am not sad.'

competencies.title: Fill in Basic Personal Information Forms
competencies.descriptor: Completar campos: Name, Age, Address, Phone, Email, Nationality

competencies.title: Very Short Messages & Postcards
competencies.descriptor: Escribir 20-30 palabras con saludos y despedidas
examples: Hi Mary! I am in London. The weather is beautiful. See you soon! Love, Carlos

competencies.title: Simple Lists & Labels
competencies.descriptor: Crear listas de compras, etiquetas, inventarios básicos
examples: Shopping list: bread, milk, eggs, cheese

competencies.title: Copywriting from Models
competencies.descriptor: Reproducir estructuras de oraciones modelo proporcionadas
examples: Model: 'My name is...' / Student writes: 'My name is Carlos'

competencies.title: Spoken English at Natural Speed (Slower pace recordings)
competencies.descriptor: Entender palabras clave en conversaciones lentas sobre temas familiares

competencies.title: Familiar Phrases & Frequent Expressions
competencies.descriptor: Reconocer: Hello, Good morning, How are you?, What's your name?, Nice to meet you

competencies.title: Numbers, Dates & Phone Numbers Spoken
competencies.descriptor: Captar correctamente teléfonos, edades, precios, direcciones

competencies.title: Simple Classroom Instructions
competencies.descriptor: Comprender: Open your books, Listen carefully, Work in pairs, Repeat, Write down

competencies.title: Basic Song & Chant Recognition
competencies.descriptor: Seguir palabras en canciones simples con repetición y ritmo

competencies.title: Greetings & Introductions
competencies.descriptor: Saludar, presentarse (I'm..., My name is...), despedirse

competencies.title: Personal Information Exchange
competencies.descriptor: Responder preguntas sobre: nombre, edad, nacionalidad, familia, profesión de padres

competencies.title: Simple Likes & Dislikes
competencies.descriptor: Expresar: I like/I don't like + noun, I like/don't like + -ing

competencies.title: Spelling & Letter Recognition
competencies.descriptor: Deletrear su nombre y palabras comunes (A-Z)

competencies.title: Repetition & Parroting Simple Utterances
competencies.descriptor: Reproducir palabras, frases y diálogos modelo sin necesidad de crear

competencies.title: Numbers 0-100 & Ordinal Basics (1st, 2nd, 3rd)
competencies.descriptor: Reconocer y producir números en contextos reales (edad, precio, teléfono)

competencies.title: Colors (11 básicos: red, blue, yellow, green, etc.)
competencies.descriptor: Identificar colores en objetos reales e imágenes
examples: Red, blue, yellow, green, orange, purple, pink, brown, black, white, gray

competencies.title: Family Members (singular & plural)
competencies.descriptor: Mother, father, sister, brother, grandmother, grandfather, cousin
examples: Mother, father, sister, brother, grandmother, grandfather, aunt, uncle, cousin

competencies.title: Days of the Week & Months
competencies.descriptor: Recognizing and producing all 7 days and 12 months, Asociar días con actividades

competencies.title: Common Food Items (15-20 items)
competencies.descriptor: Bread, cheese, apple, milk, water, coffee, chicken, rice, pizza, ice cream
examples: Bread, cheese, apple, milk, water, coffee, chicken, rice, pizza, ice cream, egg, fish, meat, salad, soup

competencies.title: Common Classroom Objects
competencies.descriptor: Book, pen, pencil, desk, chair, board, bag, ruler, notebook, scissors
examples: Book, pen, pencil, desk, chair, board, bag, ruler, notebook, scissors, eraser, marker

competencies.title: Clothing Basics (10-12 items)
competencies.descriptor: Shirt, T-shirt, pants, shoes, hat, jacket, skirt, dress, socks, gloves
examples: Shirt, T-shirt, pants, shoes, hat, jacket, skirt, dress, socks, gloves, coat, sweater

competencies.title: Animals (12-15 comunes)
competencies.descriptor: Dog, cat, bird, fish, horse, cow, chicken, lion, elephant, snake
examples: Dog, cat, bird, fish, horse, cow, chicken, lion, elephant, snake, bear, tiger, monkey, rabbit, mouse

levels.name: A2 - Elemental+
levels.description: Competencia fundamental expandida - Comunicación en contextos variados

competencies.title: Present Simple: Advanced Patterns
competencies.descriptor: Preguntas con adverbios interrogativos (What, Where, When, Why, How), Respuestas cortas (Yes, he does / No, I don't)

competencies.title: Present Continuous (Affirmative, Negative, Questions)
competencies.descriptor: Formar -ing gerunds correctamente, Diferenciar Simple vs Continuous

competencies.title: Past Simple Regular & Irregular Verbs
competencies.descriptor: 30-40 verbos irregulares comunes (go-went, see-saw, eat-ate), Negativas y preguntas

competencies.title: Comparatives & Superlatives (Adjectives)
competencies.descriptor: Regular: -er/-est, Irregular: good-better-best, bad-worse-worst, Oraciones comparativas

competencies.title: Going to (Future Plans)
competencies.descriptor: Formation: Subject + is/are + going to + infinitive, Negativas y preguntas

competencies.title: Can / Can't (Ability & Permission)
competencies.descriptor: Present ability, simple requests, polite permissions, Distinguir de Must/Should

competencies.title: Have got / Has got (Possession)
competencies.descriptor: Affirmative, negative, questions. Diferenciar de 'have' como verbo auxiliar

competencies.title: Object Pronouns (me, you, him, her, it, us, them)
competencies.descriptor: Posición correcta en oraciones, Diferenciación con sujetos

competencies.title: Short Fictional Stories (100-150 words)
competencies.descriptor: Narrativa simple con pasado y vocabulario conocido, Identificar personajes, trama básica

competencies.title: Menus & Restaurant Texts
competencies.descriptor: Entender categorías (appetizers, mains, desserts), precios, alergias, ingredientes

competencies.title: Detailed Instruction Texts (2-3 pasos)
competencies.descriptor: Recetas simples, guías de uso de productos, IKEA-style assembly

competencies.title: Simple Emails & Postcards (80-100 words)
competencies.descriptor: Saludos formales, información básica, cierre cordial, Subject line

competencies.title: Comic Strips & Illustrated Stories
competencies.descriptor: Comprensión contextual con soporte visual, diálogos simples

competencies.title: Simple Travel Texts
competencies.descriptor: Horarios de trenes/autobuses, mapas básicos, descripciones de destinos

competencies.title: Diary Entries (Personal narratives)
competencies.descriptor: Recount of past events, activities, feelings en pasado simple

competencies.title: Simple Past Narratives (5-8 sentences)
competencies.descriptor: Contar evento personal en pasado simple con conectores: and, then, after that
examples: Yesterday I went to the park...

competencies.title: Personal Diary Entries (50-70 words)
competencies.descriptor: Fecha, evento del día, emociones, planes para mañana, estilo informal

competencies.title: Short Informal Emails (60-80 words)
competencies.descriptor: Subject line, greeting, content, closing. Estructura básica clara
examples: Hi Sarah, How are you? I'm fine...

competencies.title: Descriptions of People & Places (40-60 words)
competencies.descriptor: Apariencia física, personalidad, ubicación, características, uso de adjetivos variados
examples: My friend is tall with brown hair...

competencies.title: Simple Postcards & Greeting Cards (30-40 words)
competencies.descriptor: Formato específico, saludos, información de viaje, despedida

competencies.title: Fill in Paragraph Gaps (Cloze exercises)
competencies.descriptor: Completar con palabras conocidas, consolidación de vocabulario

competencies.title: Everyday Conversations (2-3 exchanges)
competencies.descriptor: Diálogos en tiendas, restaurantes, transporte público, velocidad natural moderada

competencies.title: Simple Directions & Route Instructions
competencies.descriptor: Seguir indicaciones: turn left, go straight, take the second street

competencies.title: Past Event Descriptions
competencies.descriptor: Recount of what happened, past activities, basic storytelling

competencies.title: Simple Announcements & Advertisements
competencies.descriptor: Información de transporte, ofertas de tiendas, eventos comunitarios

competencies.title: Numbers in Context (Time, Money, Distances)
competencies.descriptor: Captar cantidades en contextos realistas con variedad de velocidad

competencies.title: Short Video Clips (30-60 seconds) with Subtitles
competencies.descriptor: Vídeos cotidianos: rutinas diarias, actividades familiares

competencies.title: Describing Daily Routines
competencies.descriptor: Estructurar día: I wake up at..., I have breakfast..., After that...

competencies.title: Talking About Past Experiences (Simple Past Stories)
competencies.descriptor: Usar pasado simple con conectores: I went..., I saw..., It was amazing because...

competencies.title: Asking for & Giving Directions
competencies.descriptor: Request: Could you tell me how to get to...? Response with landmarks, street names
examples: How do I get to the station?

competencies.title: Describing People & Objects
competencies.descriptor: Apariencia, personalidad, colores, tamaños: She's tall and has brown hair...
examples: He is tall with short black hair

competencies.title: Expressing Preferences & Making Comparisons
competencies.descriptor: I like X better than Y because..., X is more interesting than Y...
examples: I prefer coffee to tea because...

competencies.title: Making Simple Plans (Going to)
competencies.descriptor: Discussing near future: What are you going to do...? I'm going to...
examples: What are you going to do this weekend?

competencies.title: Travel & Transportation (20-25 words)
competencies.descriptor: Car, bus, train, taxi, airport, station, ticket, journey, destination, luggage, passport, suitcase
examples: Car, bus, train, taxi, airplane, airport, station, ticket, journey, destination, luggage, passport, suitcase, check-in

competencies.title: Jobs & Professions (15-20 words)
competencies.descriptor: Teacher, doctor, nurse, farmer, cook, engineer, musician, artist, policeman, firefighter, shopkeeper
examples: Teacher, doctor, nurse, farmer, cook, engineer, musician, artist, policeman, firefighter, shopkeeper, lawyer, accountant, manager

competencies.title: Weather & Climate (12-15 words)
competencies.descriptor: Sunny, rainy, cloudy, snowy, windy, hot, cold, warm, foggy, stormy, seasons
examples: Sunny, rainy, cloudy, snowy, windy, hot, cold, warm, foggy, stormy, spring, summer, autumn, winter

competencies.title: Health & Illness (15-18 words)
competencies.descriptor: Headache, stomach ache, cold, fever, cough, tired, hurt, pain, doctor, medicine, hospital
examples: Headache, stomach ache, cold, fever, cough, tired, hurt, pain, doctor, medicine, hospital, sick, vaccine

competencies.title: Leisure & Entertainment (20-25 words)
competencies.descriptor: Cinema, theater, museum, library, park, swimming pool, sports, music, games, book club, hobby
examples: Cinema, theater, museum, library, park, swimming pool, sports, music, games, book club, hobby, concert, exhibition

competencies.title: House & Rooms (15-20 words)
competencies.descriptor: Kitchen, bedroom, living room, bathroom, hallway, stairs, door, window, garden, ceiling, floor
examples: Kitchen, bedroom, living room, bathroom, hallway, stairs, door, window, garden, ceiling, floor, wall, roof

competencies.title: Furniture & Household Items (15-20 words)
competencies.descriptor: Table, chair, sofa, bed, lamp, mirror, curtains, shelf, cupboard, dishwasher, microwave
examples: Table, chair, sofa, bed, lamp, mirror, curtains, shelf, cupboard, dishwasher, microwave, refrigerator

competencies.title: Emotions & Feelings (15-18 words)
competencies.descriptor: Happy, sad, angry, scared, surprised, excited, bored, worried, confused, proud, embarrassed
examples: Happy, sad, angry, scared, surprised, excited, bored, worried, confused, proud, embarrassed, nervous

levels.name: B1 - Intermedio
levels.description: Competencia intermedia - Comunicación flexible en situaciones nuevas

competencies.title: Present Perfect Simple (Have/Has + Past Participle)
competencies.descriptor: Utilizar para experiencias y cambios recientes, Diferenciación con pasado simple, Ever/Never, Just/Already/Yet

competencies.title: Present Perfect Continuous (Have/Has + been + -ing)
competencies.descriptor: Acciones que continúan desde el pasado, Duración enfatizada, Comparación con simple
examples: I have been working here for 5 years
She has been studying all day

competencies.title: First Conditional (If + Present, + Will + Infinitive)
competencies.descriptor: Situaciones reales futuras, Probabilidad alta, Negativas y preguntas estructuradas
examples: If you study, you will pass
If it rains, we'll stay home

competencies.title: Modal Verbs: Should, Shouldn't, Must, Mustn't, Might
competencies.descriptor: Obligación, prohibición, consejo, posibilidad. Contextos apropiados para cada uno

competencies.title: Past Continuous (Was/Were + -ing)
competencies.descriptor: Acciones interrumpidas, dos acciones simultáneas, Narrativa detallada
examples: While I was eating, the phone rang
She was sleeping when the alarm went off

competencies.title: Passive Voice: Simple Present & Simple Past
competencies.descriptor: Estructura: Subject + to be + past participle, Cuándo usar activa vs pasiva
examples: The book was written by Cervantes
The letter is delivered every morning

competencies.title: Relative Clauses (who, which, that) - Defining
competencies.descriptor: Proporcionar información esencial sobre sustantivos, Posición correcta en oración
examples: The man who called me yesterday is my uncle
The car that I bought is blue

competencies.title: Quantifiers (some, any, much, many, a few, a little)
competencies.descriptor: Correcto con contables e incontables, Uso en preguntas, Contextos naturales

competencies.title: News Articles & Current Events (200-300 words)
competencies.descriptor: Identificar ideas principales, detalles, opiniones del autor implícitas

competencies.title: Opinion Pieces & Blog Posts
competencies.descriptor: Comprensión de argumentos, rastreo de opiniones vs hechos, Identificación de evidencia

competencies.title: Short Fiction & Classic Stories Adapted (300-400 words)
competencies.descriptor: Comprensión de narrativa compleja, characterization, plot structure

competencies.title: Informational Brochures & Guides (Tourism, Health)
competencies.descriptor: Extracción de información específica, organización lógica de contenido

competencies.title: Multi-paragraph Emails & Formal Letters (150-200 words)
competencies.descriptor: Estructura: apertura, cuerpo, cierre, tono formal/informal según contexto

competencies.title: Movie/Book Reviews & Recommendations
competencies.descriptor: Expresión de opinión respaldada, descripción de argumento, recomendación justificada

competencies.title: Opinion Essays (200-250 words)
competencies.descriptor: Tesis clara, 2-3 párrafos de apoyo, conclusión, conectores de secuencia (Furthermore, However, Therefore)

competencies.title: Formal Letters (150-180 words)
competencies.descriptor: Address, formal greeting, clear purpose, body paragraphs, professional closing (Sincerely, Best regards)

competencies.title: Written Summaries of Texts (100-120 words)
competencies.descriptor: Capturar ideas principales, parafrasear sin copiar, mantener objetividad

competencies.title: Extended Descriptions (180-220 words)
competencies.descriptor: Lugares, eventos, personas con detalles sensoriales, estructura clara, adjetivos variados

competencies.title: Simple Narrative Compositions (250-300 words)
competencies.descriptor: Introducción, desarrollo, clímax, resolución, uso de tiempos variados correctamente

competencies.title: Product/Service Reviews (120-150 words)
competencies.descriptor: Experiencia personal, aspectos positivos/negativos, recomendación, ejemplos específicos

competencies.title: Podcast Episodes on Familiar Topics (5-10 minutes)
competencies.descriptor: Comprensión global y selectiva, identificación de tema, ideas principales, detalles de apoyo

competencies.title: Television & Radio News Reports (2-3 minutes)
competencies.descriptor: Seguimiento de noticias, hechos principales, contexto, cifras, citas directas

competencies.title: Short Documentary Extracts (5-8 minutes)
competencies.descriptor: Narración informativa, datos específicos, perspectivas presentadas

competencies.title: TED Talk Shorts (5-7 minutes, tópicos familiares)
competencies.descriptor: Presentación temática, estructura lógica, ejemplos, conclusión clara

competencies.title: Telephone Conversations & Voicemails
competencies.descriptor: Contextos reales: citas médicas, reservas, resolución de problemas, números mencionados

competencies.title: Interview Extracts (3-4 minutes)
competencies.descriptor: Preguntas y respuestas, tono conversacional, información biográfica, opiniones expresadas

competencies.title: Guided Debates on Simple Topics
competencies.descriptor: Expresar acuerdo/desacuerdo: I agree/disagree because..., That's a good point, but..., On the other hand...

competencies.title: Narrative & Personal Experience Sharing
competencies.descriptor: Contar histórias detalladas con contexto, reacciones, lecciones aprendidas

competencies.title: Giving Advice & Making Recommendations
competencies.descriptor: You should/shouldn't..., I think you could try..., Have you considered...?

competencies.title: Describing Trends & Making Comparisons
competencies.descriptor: Presente perfecto + cambios observados, Comparativos/superlativos, gráficos/datos

competencies.title: Role-play: Professional Scenarios (Job Interview, Customer Service)
competencies.descriptor: Respuestas apropiadas, vocabulario profesional, estructura cortés

competencies.title: Presentations (2-3 minutes) on Known Topics
competencies.descriptor: Introducción clara, puntos organizados, conclusión, manejo de público básico

competencies.title: Emotions & Emotional States (20-25 words)
competencies.descriptor: Frustration, anticipation, contentment, anxiety, nostalgia, determination, indifference, enthusiasm, skepticism, optimism, pessimism
examples: Frustrated, anticipating, content, anxious, nostalgic, determined, indifferent, enthusiastic, skeptical, optimistic, pessimistic

competencies.title: Technology & Internet (25-30 words)
competencies.descriptor: Laptop, smartphone, app, download, upload, email attachment, software, password, website, search engine, social media, online, digital, virtual
examples: Laptop, smartphone, app, download, upload, attachment, software, password, website, search engine, social media, online, digital, virtual, cloud

competencies.title: Education & Learning (20-25 words)
competencies.descriptor: Degree, subject, thesis, research, lecture, seminar, exam, scholarship, curriculum, enrollment, tuition, academic, study abroad, extracurricular
examples: Degree, subject, thesis, research, lecture, seminar, exam, scholarship, curriculum, enrollment, tuition, academic, study abroad, extracurricular, internship

competencies.title: Environmental & Social Issues (25-30 words)
competencies.descriptor: Climate change, pollution, recycling, renewable energy, conservation, sustainability, greenhouse gas, carbon footprint, deforestation, species extinction, social responsibility, community, poverty, inequality
examples: Climate change, pollution, recycling, renewable energy, conservation, sustainability, greenhouse gas, carbon footprint, deforestation, extinction, responsibility, community, poverty, inequality

competencies.title: Business & Commerce (20-25 words)
competencies.descriptor: Marketing, sales, profit, revenue, contract, invoice, employee, manager, company, customer, product, service, budget, investment, competition
examples: Marketing, sales, profit, revenue, contract, invoice, employee, manager, company, customer, product, service, budget, investment, competition

levels.name: B2 - Intermedio-Alto
levels.description: Competencia intermedia-alta - Comunicación fluida y espontánea

competencies.title: Passive Voice: All Tenses (Including Complex Structures)
competencies.descriptor: Present, past, future forms, Modal passives (can be done, must be completed), Causatives (had it repaired)

competencies.title: Reported Speech (Statements, Questions, Commands)
competencies.descriptor: Transformación de tiempos, Cambios de pronombres y referencias, backshift de tiempos
examples: She said that she was tired
He asked if I wanted coffee

competencies.title: Second Conditional (If + Past, + Would + Infinitive)
competencies.descriptor: Situaciones imaginarias presentes, consejos oblicuos, Estructuras mixtas
examples: If I were you, I would study
If we had money, we would travel

competencies.title: Third Conditional (If + Had, + Would have + Past Participle)
competencies.descriptor: Arrepentimientos, análisis de eventos pasados alternativos, cadenas de condicionales
examples: If I had studied, I would have passed
If she had called, I would have come

competencies.title: Mixed Conditionals (Combinaciones de 1ero, 2do, 3er condicional)
competencies.descriptor: Pasado imaginario + presente real, Presente imaginario + consecuencias pasadas
examples: If I had studied, I would be a doctor now
If I spoke Spanish, I would have understood him

competencies.title: Advanced Relative Clauses (Non-defining, Prepositions + Relative Pronouns)
competencies.descriptor: Which (for whole clause), whom, whose, where, when, why. Comas en defining vs non-defining
examples: My brother, who lives in Madrid, is a doctor
The book in which I found the answer

competencies.title: Inversion for Emphasis & Advanced Word Order
competencies.descriptor: Rarely have I..., Seldom does..., Under no circumstances will...
examples: Rarely have I seen such beauty

competencies.title: Nominalization (Turning Verbs/Adjectives into Nouns)
competencies.descriptor: The development of..., His arrival was..., The complexity of the issue...

competencies.title: Complex News Analysis & Opinion Pieces (400-500 words)
competencies.descriptor: Múltiples perspectivas, crítica implícita, reconocimiento de sesgo, análisis de retorica

competencies.title: Contemporary Fiction & Literary Extracts (500+ words)
competencies.descriptor: Estilo narrativo, técnicas literarias, simbolismo implícito, desarrollo de caracteres complejos

competencies.title: Technical Reports & Academic Articles (Abstract nivel)
competencies.descriptor: Vocabulario especializado, estructura de investigación, conclusiones basadas en datos

competencies.title: Biographies & Memoirs (300-400 words)
competencies.descriptor: Narrativa de vida, análisis de contexto histórico, motivaciones inferidas

competencies.title: Literary Criticism & Academic Essays (350-450 words)
competencies.descriptor: Argumentación sofisticada, referencias a textos, análisis crítico, evaluación juicio

competencies.title: Formal/Persuasive Essays (400-500 words)
competencies.descriptor: Tesis clara, contraargumentos anticipados y refutados, evidencia específica, conclusión impactante

competencies.title: Detailed Reports (250-350 words)
competencies.descriptor: Executive summary, body con apartados, datos y análisis, recomendaciones, lenguaje formal

competencies.title: Formal Complaint Letters (150-200 words)
competencies.descriptor: Tono asertivo pero respetuoso, detalles específicos, demanda clara, referencias a políticas

competencies.title: Book/Film Reviews with Critical Analysis (250-300 words)
competencies.descriptor: Síntesis de argumento, análisis de técnicas, evaluación personal justificada, contexto del autor/director

competencies.title: Extended Narratives or Creative Pieces (350-400 words)
competencies.descriptor: Estructura narrativa clara, desarrollo de personajes, diálogos realistas, manejo de tono

competencies.title: Analytical Summaries (120-150 words de 400-500 palabra source)
competencies.descriptor: Capturar argumento central, omitir ejemplos menores, mantener proporción, análisis implícito

competencies.title: Full-Length Interviews (10-15 minutes)
competencies.descriptor: Perspectiva del entrevistado, preguntas implícitas, matices de respuestas, contexto social/cultural

competencies.title: Documentary Features (15-20 minutes)
competencies.descriptor: Narrativa compleja, múltiples voces, datos presentados, conclusiones sugeridas implícitamente

competencies.title: Academic Lectures (15-20 minutes)
competencies.descriptor: Estructura argumentativa, definiciones de términos técnicos, ejemplos, conclusiones, asunciones implícitas

competencies.title: Political Speeches & Debates (10-15 minutes)
competencies.descriptor: Retórica persuasiva, apelaciones emocionales, lógica argumentativa, falsos dilemas reconocidos

competencies.title: Authentic Films/Drama (30-60 minute extracts)
competencies.descriptor: Diálogos variados, acentos diversos, expresiones idiomáticas, contexto cultural implícito

competencies.title: Podcasts de Opinión (20-30 minutes)
competencies.descriptor: Perspectivas, supuestos implícitos, tono del locutor, audiencia objetivo implied

competencies.title: Formal Presentations (5-7 minutes) with Q&A
competencies.descriptor: Estructura clara, manejo de público, transiciones entre tópicos, respuesta a preguntas desafiantes

competencies.title: Debates & Argumentation on Complex Topics
competencies.descriptor: Presentación de posición, contra-argumentos, evidencia citada, refutación elegante, admisión de puntos válidos contrarios

competencies.title: Negotiation Role-plays (Business Scenarios)
competencies.descriptor: Propuesta inicial, concesiones estratégicas, lenguaje diplomático, cierre de acuerdo

competencies.title: Analysis & Opinion on Current Events/Controversial Topics
competencies.descriptor: Múltiples perspectivas presentadas, matices reconocidos, evidencia de lecturas variadas

competencies.title: Storytelling with Sophisticated Language & Humor
competencies.descriptor: Narrative devices, foreshadowing, juego de palabras, timing para chistes, tono narrativo variable

competencies.title: Spontaneous Discussions (10-15 minutes) without preparation
competencies.descriptor: Fluidez, vocabulario variado, auto-corrección natural, ideas desarrolladas

competencies.title: Abstract Concepts (20-25 words)
competencies.descriptor: Justice, freedom, equality, democracy, ethics, morality, integrity, hypocrisy, paradox, irony, ambiguity, contradiction, authenticity, virtue, tolerance
examples: Justice, freedom, equality, democracy, ethics, morality, integrity, hypocrisy, paradox, irony, ambiguity, contradiction, authenticity

competencies.title: Business & Economics (30-35 words)
competencies.descriptor: Merger, acquisition, dividend, shareholder, stakeholder, monopoly, supply chain, logistics, inflation, interest rate, fiscal policy, monetary policy, trade deficit, surplus
examples: Merger, acquisition, dividend, shareholder, stakeholder, monopoly, supply chain, logistics, inflation, interest rate, fiscal policy, monetary policy, trade deficit

competencies.title: Science & Technology (30-35 words)
competencies.descriptor: Quantum, algorithm, artificial intelligence, blockchain, cybersecurity, biotechnology, nanotechnology, genetics, genome, mutation, enzyme, hypothesis, empirical, hypothesis, regression
examples: Quantum, algorithm, AI, blockchain, cybersecurity, biotechnology, nanotechnology, genetics, genome, mutation, enzyme, hypothesis, empirical

competencies.title: Culture & Arts (25-30 words)
competencies.descriptor: Renaissance, baroque, impressionism, abstract, avant-garde, semantics, metaphor, personification, satire, allegory, motif, genre, modernism, cubism, surrealism
examples: Renaissance, baroque, impressionism, abstract, avant-garde, metaphor, personification, satire, allegory, motif, genre, modernism, cubism

competencies.title: Social & Political Issues (30-35 words)
competencies.descriptor: Discrimination, prejudice, stereotype, bias, minority, marginalization, advocacy, activism, civil rights, human rights, sovereignty, imperialism, colonialism, decolonization, geopolitics
examples: Discrimination, prejudice, stereotype, bias, minority, marginalization, advocacy, activism, civil rights, human rights, sovereignty, imperialism, colonialism

levels.name: C1 - Avanzado
levels.description: Competencia avanzada - Dominio efectivo del idioma en contextos sofisticados

competencies.title: Advanced Inversion & Stylistic Structures
competencies.descriptor: Fronting (A better solution would be...), Cleft sentences (It was his leadership that...), Emphasis through word order
examples: It was his dedication that made the difference

competencies.title: Subjunctive Mood (Formal & Literary)
competencies.descriptor: Mandate subjunctive (It is crucial that he arrive on time), Literary (If he were to...), Formal recommendations
examples: It is essential that she be informed
If he were to arrive late

competencies.title: Advanced Participle Structures
competencies.descriptor: Participle clauses for economy of expression (Having completed..., Being aware of...), Dangling participles avoided
examples: Having completed the analysis, we concluded...
Being aware of the risks, she proceeded cautiously

competencies.title: Complex Noun Phrases & Dense Information Packing
competencies.descriptor: Pre- and post-modification extensive, Noun phrases de 3+ palabras, Information compacted elegantly
examples: The increasingly controversial climate change policy...

competencies.title: Ellipsis & Substitution for Elegant Variation
competencies.descriptor: Evitar repetición mediante elipsis, 'so' y 'do' para evitar repetir verbos, Registro natural avanzado
examples: She wanted to go, but he didn't [want to go]

competencies.title: Register & Style Variation Across Genres
competencies.descriptor: Cambio de tono según contexto (académico vs. periodístico vs. literario), Conciencia de audience
examples: Academic style vs. journalistic style vs. literary style

competencies.title: Academic Journals & Research Articles (Complete papers)
competencies.descriptor: Metodología, análisis estadístico, discusión de implicaciones, literatura citada, evaluación crítica de fuentes

competencies.title: Classical & Modern Literature (Complete works or substantial extracts)
competencies.descriptor: Análisis de técnica narrativa, simbolismo, contexto histórico, influencias literarias, teoría literaria aplicada

competencies.title: Philosophical & Critical Theory Texts (500+ words)
competencies.descriptor: Conceptos abstractos, argumentación compleja, vocabulario especializado, inferencias sofisticadas

competencies.title: Specialized Technical Documentation (Engineering, Medical)
competencies.descriptor: Terminología precisa, procedimientos complejos, especificaciones, notación técnica, normas de redacción técnica

competencies.title: Political Analysis & Geopolitical Commentary
competencies.descriptor: Múltiples actores, intereses conflictivos, contexto histórico profundo, predicciones basadas en análisis

competencies.title: Extended Academic Essays (1000+ words)
competencies.descriptor: Hipótesis articulada, literatura revisada exhaustivamente, análisis original, contraargumentos anticipados y refutados elegantemente, conclusiones sofisticadas

competencies.title: Professional Reports & White Papers (1000-1500 words)
competencies.descriptor: Propósito claro, recomendaciones basadas en análisis, implementación de hallazgos, secciones bien definidas

competencies.title: Literature Reviews & Research Syntheses (1000+ words)
competencies.descriptor: Síntesis de literatura existente, identificación de lagunas en investigación, perspectiva crítica, organización temática o teórica

competencies.title: Opinion Columns & Editorial Pieces (500-800 words)
competencies.descriptor: Voz personal distintiva, argumentación sofisticada, apelación a valores/emociones equilibrada, impacto retórico

competencies.title: Creative Non-fiction & Personal Essays (800-1000 words)
competencies.descriptor: Narración reflexiva, análisis de experiencia personal, stilística variada, resonancia emocional y cognitiva

competencies.title: Formal Academic Presentations (15-20 minutes)
competencies.descriptor: Monografías temáticas, manejo de preguntas técnicas, citación de fuentes, defensa de posiciones, interacción con audiencia experta

competencies.title: Panel Discussions & Expert Commentary (Prepared & Spontaneous)
competencies.descriptor: Contribución equilibrada, respeto por otros panelistas, síntesis de puntos diversos, reafirmación de propias posiciones con nuevas evidencias

competencies.title: Persuasive Public Speaking & Rhetoric
competencies.descriptor: Construcción de argumento en cascada, uso de estadísticas y anécdotas, tono que cambia según propósito (informar vs. persuadir vs. inspirar)

competencies.title: Socratic Dialogue & Intellectual Debate
competencies.descriptor: Cuestionamiento socrático, reconocimiento de complejidad, disposición a revalorar posiciones, lenguaje diplomático en desacuerdos

competencies.title: Broadcast/Media Interviews (Prepared & Live)
competencies.descriptor: Mensajes clave transmitidos, manejo de preguntas difíciles, brevedad con sustancia, adecuación al medio (radio vs. TV)

competencies.title: Interdisciplinary Commentary (Linguistic, Cultural, Historical Perspectives)
competencies.descriptor: Análisis desde múltiples ángulos, integración de contexto, vocabulario especializado de múltiples campos

competencies.title: Formal Academic Presentations (15-20 minutes)
competencies.descriptor: Monografías temáticas, manejo de preguntas técnicas, citación de fuentes, defensa de posiciones, interacción con audiencia experta

competencies.title: Panel Discussions & Expert Commentary (Prepared & Spontaneous)
competencies.descriptor: Contribución equilibrada, respeto por otros panelistas, síntesis de puntos diversos, reafirmación de propias posiciones con nuevas evidencias

competencies.title: Persuasive Public Speaking & Rhetoric
competencies.descriptor: Construcción de argumento en cascada, uso de estadísticas y anécdotas, tono que cambia según propósito (informar vs. persuadir vs. inspirar)

competencies.title: Socratic Dialogue & Intellectual Debate
competencies.descriptor: Cuestionamiento socrático, reconocimiento de complejidad, disposición a revalorar posiciones, lenguaje diplomático en desacuerdos

competencies.title: Broadcast/Media Interviews (Prepared & Live)
competencies.descriptor: Mensajes clave transmitidos, manejo de preguntas difíciles, brevedad con sustancia, adecuación al medio (radio vs. TV)

competencies.title: Interdisciplinary Commentary (Linguistic, Cultural, Historical Perspectives)
competencies.descriptor: Análisis desde múltiples ángulos, integración de contexto, vocabulario especializado de múltiples campos

competencies.title: Sophisticated Literary Devices (15-20 terms)
competencies.descriptor: Metonymy, synecdoche, oxymoron, zeugma, hendiadys, asyndeton, polysyndeton, antithesis, paradox, apotheosis, bathos, pun, malapropism
examples: Metonymy, synecdoche, oxymoron, zeugma, asyndeton, polysyndeton, antithesis, paradox, apotheosis, bathos

competencies.title: Philosophy & Abstract Thinking (20-25 words)
competencies.descriptor: Epistemology, ontology, phenomenology, existentialism, nihilism, determinism, free will, consciousness, intentionality, realism, nominalism, rationalism, empiricism, relativism, absolutism
examples: Epistemology, ontology, phenomenology, existentialism, nihilism, determinism, free will, consciousness, intentionality, realism

competencies.title: Scientific & Medical Terminology (30-40 words)
competencies.descriptor: Pathogenesis, etiology, prognosis, proliferation, differentiation, apoptosis, mutation, heterozygous, homozygous, protein synthesis, metabolic pathway, cellular respiration, photosynthesis, ecosystem, biodiversity
examples: Pathogenesis, etiology, prognosis, proliferation, apoptosis, mutation, protein synthesis, metabolic pathway, cellular respiration

competencies.title: Legal & Political Terminology (25-30 words)
competencies.descriptor: Jurisprudence, tort, precedent, jurisdiction, legislature, executive, judiciary, sovereignty, treaty, protocol, embargo, sanctions, hegemony, autocracy, oligarchy, plutocracy, meritocracy
examples: Jurisprudence, tort, precedent, jurisdiction, sovereignty, treaty, embargo, sanctions, hegemony, autocracy, oligarchy

competencies.title: Stylistic & Rhetorical Terms (20-25 words)
competencies.descriptor: Allusion, circumlocution, euphemism, hyperbole, understatement, litotes, irony, sarcasm, bombast, grandiloguence, pedantry, pathos, ethos, logos, rhetoric, pragmatism, sophistry
examples: Allusion, circumlocution, euphemism, hyperbole, litotes, irony, sarcasm, bombast, pathos, ethos, logos, rhetoric
